In this tutorial, we will discuss the practical techniques that can be used to perform a successful hit-and-run. We will cover how to avoid witnesses and destroy evidence to ensure that you can carry out your activities without being caught.

Section 1: Preparing for the Hit-and-Run
---------------------------------------
